summary: Frontend testing for virtual keyboard removal and mobile responsiveness. All features verified working: VirtualKeyboard completely removed from all kiosk screens, responsive layouts work correctly on mobile (390x844), tablet (768x1024), and desktop (1920x800) viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: VirtualKeyboard.jsx file still exists in /app/frontend/src/components/vastgoed-kiosk/ but is not imported anywhere - consider deleting the unused file for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Virtual keyboard removal and mobile responsiveness fully tested. All kiosk screens (PIN entry, apartment selection, tenant overview) work correctly on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports. VirtualKeyboard component file exists but is not imported anywhere.
